description: US automotive company
description_wiki: Dodge is an American brand of automobiles and a division of Stellantis, based in Auburn Hills, Michigan.

description: global war originating in Europe, 1914–1918
description_wiki: World War I, or the First World War (28 July 1914 – 11 November 1918), also known as The Great War, was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies (or Entente) and the Central Powers.

description_wiki: South Carolina (  KARR-ə-LY-nə) is a state in the Southeastern, South Atlantic and Deep South regions of the United States.

river in the southeastern United States
description_wiki: The Savannah River is a major river in the Southeastern United States, forming most of the border between the states of Georgia and South Carolina.

description: largest city of the state of Louisiana, United States
description_wiki: New Orleans (commonly known as NOLA or  The Big Easy, among other nicknames) is a consolidated city-parish located along the Mississippi River in the U.S. state of Louisiana.

description: frontier conflicts between American, Canadian and European settlers and Indigenous peoples of the Americas
1861–1865 civil war in the United States between the North and the South over the enslavement of African-Americans
description_wiki: The American Civil War (April 12, 1861 – May 26, 1865; also known by other names) was a civil war in the United States between the Union ("the North") and the Confederacy ("the South"), which was formed in 1861 by states that had seceded from the Union to preserve slavery in the United States, which they saw as threatened because of the election of Abraham Lincoln and the growing abolitionist movement in the North.

description: seat of Harris County, and largest city in State of Texas, United States
description_wiki: Houston (  HEW-stən) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Texas and the Southern United States.

description_wiki: Galveston ( GAL-vis-tən) is a resort city and port on the Gulf Coast of the U.S. state of Texas.

description_wiki: The University of South Carolina (USC, SC, or Carolina) is a public research university in Columbia, South Carolina, United States.

description_wiki: John Calhoun Sheppard (July 5, 1850 – October 17, 1931) was the 82nd governor of South Carolina from July 10, 1886, to November 30, 1886.

president of the United States from 1913 to 1921 (1856–1924)
description_wiki: Thomas Woodrow Wilson (December 28, 1856 – February 3, 1924) was the 28th president of the United States, serving from 1913 to 1921.

description: American politician (1847–1918)
description_wiki: Benjamin Ryan Tillman (August 11, 1847 – July 3, 1918) was an American Democratic Party politician who served as governor of South Carolina from 1890 to 1894, and as a United States Senator from 1895 until his death in 1918.
